hero.name: Afonso Kemalandua
hero.description: Cloud-Oriented Software Engineer (AWS) specializing in React, React Native, NestJS and Spring Boot. Building scalable, secure and maintainable digital solutions.

about.title: About me
about.description: I'm a Cloud-Oriented Software Engineer building scalable web and mobile applications using React, React Native, NestJS and Spring Boot. I work across frontend and backend, designing APIs, integrating systems and improving performance. I'm expanding my expertise in cloud architecture and DevOps practices, utilizing providers like AWS for infrastructure and automation, focusing on clean code, reliability and long-term maintainability.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: I've worked on many projects, these are the ones I wanted to highlight
